post.description: This API helps unmoderate a forum topic, which means user comments are published without reviewing.

get.description: This API lists a particular number of forum topics, based on the limit defined.

parameters.name: isSticky
parameters.description: Key that defines whether the topics to list must be sticky posts or not

post.description: This API helps add a forum topic in the user community.

delete.description: This API permanently deletes forum topics from the trash.

post.description: This API associates quick access/reference tags to a forum topic.
This API helps to approve topics and publish them on the forum.
This API marks a forum topic as spam.

put.description: This API helps update the draft of a forum topic.

get.description: This API fetches a forum topic from the user community.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Additional information related to the topics. Values allowed are: @seo@, @featuredImage@ and @participantsCount@.

patch.description: This API helps update a published forum topic.

delete.description: This API deletes a topic draft from the user community.

get.description: This API lists a particular number of users who follow a forum topic, based on the limit defined.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Index number, starting from which the users must be listed.

post.description: This API removes quick access/reference tags from a forum topic.
This API unmoderate the moderated forum topics.The comments that are posted during moderation will be displayed to all users without under going any review.
This API marks multiple forum topics as spam.
This API helps unlock a forum topic, so that further user actions can be performed.
This API saves a draft of a forum topic.

This API trashes forum topics that are yet to be moderated for publishing.

get.description: This API fetches the total count of the topics based on the selected view.

parameters.name: viewId
parameters.description: ID of a view for which you need to get the count

schema.description: ID of a view for which you need to get the count

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Status label by which topics must be filtered. The value of this key varies according to the topic type. Values allowed are: @NOSTATUS@, @NEEDMOREINFO@, @WORKINGONIT@, @ANSWERED@, @UNANSWERED@, @MAYBELATER@, @UNDERREVIEW@, @IMPLEMENTED@, @WILLNOTIMPLEMENT@, @NOTAPROBLEM@, @TEMPORARYFIX@, @ANALYZING@, @SOLVED@, @UNSOLVED@, and @MOSTVOTED@.

schema.description: Status label by which topics must be filtered. The value of this key varies according to the topic type. Values allowed are: @NOSTATUS@, @NEEDMOREINFO@, @WORKINGONIT@, @ANSWERED@, @UNANSWERED@, @MAYBELATER@, @UNDERREVIEW@, @IMPLEMENTED@, @WILLNOTIMPLEMENT@, @NOTAPROBLEM@, @TEMPORARYFIX@, @ANALYZING@, @SOLVED@, @UNSOLVED@, and @MOSTVOTED@.

This API allows to set the forum topics as moderate. The comments that are posted during moderation will not be displayed to users and await for the review.
This API moves a forum topic from one community category to another.

parameters.description: Starting time of the time range in which the topics should have been created. The value must be expressed according to the GMT time zone.
